utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 top-level items. Now check each for full specification per the format (they require the type of coverage and costs):
- health_coverage: Provided with physical and mental health insurance entries, each with plan names and monthly costs. Fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Includes home/contents insurance with a plan name and monthly cost. Fully specified with costs.
- travel_coverage: Includes travel insurance (general and adventure add-on) with plan names and monthly costs. Fully specified with costs.
- additional_services: Includes enhancement service with plan name and monthly cost. Fully specified with costs.
- total_budget: Provides breakdown including subtotal, discount, final monthly and annual totals. Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and include the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each plan in the final coverage to the exact item names present in the ground-truth and return their ratings. The final plan includes: EliteCare Premium Plan for both physical and mental health; InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home contents; Adventure Travel Coverage (Add-on) from travel_enhancement_services; InsurePlus Standard Plan for general travel insurance; and Premium Insurance Membership from general_services.
